operating_system.name: BC SOS / BCA OS
operating_system.role: Founder-controlled operating system for the Blue Collar Apps ecosystem.

apps.name: FootTruck Apollo
apps.revenue: $29/mo Basic, $79/mo Pro. The Foundry $99 custom-shop tier.
apps.field_note: Live now plus Render backend. First monetization track.

apps.name: Captain Culinary Pro Hub
apps.field_note: Professional culinary career and progression platform.

apps.name: Captain Culinary Kids
apps.revenue: Family tiers; faith-community and school site licensing; grant-funded seats.
apps.field_note: Launch gates: COPPA, parental consent, safe on-device fallback.

apps.name: Restaurateur Pro
apps.field_note: Concept and expansion toolkit absorbed into one operator platform.

apps.name: Margin IQ
apps.field_note: Live now at margin-iq.onrender.com. Pairs with Restaurateur Pro planning.

apps.name: Hotel / Resort Developer
apps.tagline: From Napkin Sketch to Investor Handshake
apps.field_note: Concept lane; build slot follows live-product scale.

apps.name: AllergenShield
apps.field_note: Launch gates: liability opinion and product insurance before launch.

apps.name: Venue IQ
apps.field_note: Redesign in motion; ships to its own repo.

apps.name: Maestro
apps.field_note: Pairs with VaultSpace as the Life Management suite.

apps.name: VaultSpace
apps.tagline: Military-Grade Security for Life's Important Things
apps.field_note: Also serves as Conrad's runtime memory store inside EXPO OS.

apps.name: Dusk
apps.revenue: Freemium plus featured listings, booking commissions, and bundle fees.
apps.field_note: City-by-city launch; Nashville first, then Miami, Austin, NYC.

apps.name: Round Table
apps.revenue: Freemium; premium venue tiers; organizer tools.
apps.field_note: Iteration 18+. Gate: A2P 10DLC and TCPA consent before SMS features.

apps.name: Vine & Barrel
apps.revenue: Tasting-kit sales, event tickets, memberships, winery partnerships.
apps.field_note: Home of the Foxhounds Wine & Craft Beer Social club.

apps.name: Plate Me
apps.field_note: Visual-first; the camera is the input, the plate is the proof.

apps.name: PubHub
apps.tagline: Find Your Pub. Find Your People.
apps.revenue: Pub listing subscriptions, event-promotion fees, premium features.
apps.field_note: Concept lane; natural neighbor to Dusk and Round Table.

apps.name: Valet Captain
apps.revenue: Valet company subscriptions, transaction fees, insurance commission.
apps.field_note: Concept lane; pairs with Dusk's VIP Night Builder.

apps.name: EXPO OS + Conrad
apps.tagline: The Brain Behind Blue Collar Apps
apps.revenue: Internal platform; powers every product in the portfolio.
apps.field_note: Conrad is the expediter; information flows through him to where it is needed.

apps.name: BrainForge
apps.revenue: Internal platform; the assembly line for new agents.
apps.field_note: Feeds the standalone agent fleet that rides the operator's belt.

agents.name: Permit Pilot
agents.best_for: Operators drowning in licensing red tape.

agents.name: Health Inspector Prep
agents.best_for: Kitchens that cannot afford a failed inspection.

agents.name: Cost Sentinel
agents.tagline: Watches Every Dollar on the Line
agents.best_for: Operators guarding food cost and margin.

agents.name: Cap
agents.best_for: Home cooks and students learning the craft.

agents.name: Catering Captain
agents.best_for: Caterers, private chefs, and event venues.
